name: Almond Bread
recipeIngredient: 8oz. can almond paste, cut into about 1/8-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the milk into the baking pan of your bread machine.
2. Break in the egg.
3. If the instructions that came with your ABM call for putting the yeast in the pan first, add it now and incorporate the liquid ingredients last.
4. Add the softened butter to the liquids.
5. Next, add the almond paste, ensuring it blends well by slicing it.
6. Measure in the flour, brown sugar, and salt, then add the yeast as directed for your bread machine.
7. Use the full cycle or quick cycle on your machine; if a light color setting is available, use it.
8. Remove the loaf from the pan once baking is complete, sealing the cover again.
9. Brush the top of the loaf with the corn syrup and warm water mixture using a pastry brush.
10. Sprinkle slivered almonds over the glaze.
11. Return the bread gently to its pan and back into the oven for a few minutes to allow the glaze to dry slightly.
